news.headline: Catastrophe Is Emerging in the World’s Most Vulnerable Places
news.summary: The humanitarian relief system, decimated by cuts, faces a grave challenge as the Middle East war causes soaring costs for food, fuel and fertilizer.

news.headline: Trump warns 'clock is ticking' for Iran as peace progress stalls
news.summary: Iranian media reports the US has not made concrete concessions in response to Tehran's latest proposals.

news.headline: Xi Jinping prepares to welcome Vladimir Putin to China, four days after hosting Donald Trump
news.summary: <p>China’s deep relationship with Russia remains a continuing cause for concern in the west, particularly since Moscow launched its invasion of Ukraine</p><p>Xi Jinping and Vladimir Putin exchanged “congratulatory letters” on Sunday ahead of the Russian president’s visit to Beijing

news.headline: 'Everest Man' and 'Mountain Queen' break own records scaling world's tallest peak
news.summary: Kami Rita Sherpa and Lakpa Sherpa summited Everest for the 32nd and 11th time, respectively.
